Por matarme

Contra la pared si tΟΚ lo quieres
Ey solo si quieres

No es que no quiera contigo
Pero me va mejor si de ti me olvido
No crea que yo no vi esa llamada
Aquella madrugada

Lo nuestro se estΟΓ muriendo
No lo entiendo 
Si fuiste tΟΚ si fui yo si fue el tiempo
Pero no busquemoβÄô un culpable
Sabes que esto nunca fue estable

Que para olvidarte lo necesito
Que pa¬¥ no llamarte lo necesito

snippet.title: Machu Picchu, el lugar mΟΓs espectacular de SudamΟ©rica
snippet.description:
Escondido entre dos montaΟ±as en los Andes peruanos, Machu Picchu es un sΟ≠mbolo de la grandeza de la civilizaciΟ≥n incaica. Los sistemas de cultivos, los caminos y la increΟ≠ble arquitectura de los incas se ve reflejada en este lugar. 

El lugar fue redescubierto reciΟ©n en 1911 por un investigador estadounidense, aunque se cree que la gente del lugar ya lo conocΟ≠a. Igualmente, reciΟ©n ahΟ≠ tomΟ≥ la fama mundial que merece, mΟΓs de tres siglos despuΟ©s de haber sido abandonado. 

Machu Picchu es una de las grandes atracciones turΟ≠sticas de SudamΟ©rica. Antes de la pandemia, un millΟ≥n y medio de personas visitaban las ruinas cada aΟ±o. Los amantes del trekking y la naturaleza podrΟΓn recorrer tambiΟ©n los distintos caminos trazados en la Ο©poca incaica.

en.title: Machu Picchu, the most spectacular place in South America
en.description:
Hidden between two mountains in the Peruvian Andes, Machu Picchu is a symbol of the greatness of the Inca civilization. The farming systems, the roads and the incredible architecture of the Incas are reflected in this place.

The place was only rediscovered in 1911 by an American researcher, although it is believed that the locals already knew it. Likewise, it was only there that it took on the world fame it deserves, more than three centuries after being abandoned.

Machu Picchu is one of the great tourist attractions in South America. Before the pandemic, one and a half million people visited the ruins every year. Lovers of trekking and nature will also be able to travel the different paths traced in Inca times.


πü¨é Un Mundo Inmenso

snippet.title: 3 claves de la escalada de violencia entre israelΟ≠es y palestinos en JerusalΟ©n y Gaza | BBC Mundo
snippet.description:
Una nueva ola de violencia entre israelΟ≠es y palestinos ya ha dejado al menos 53 muertos en la Franja de Gaza, varios de ellos niΟ±os, y otros seis en Israel.
Los bombardeos se produjeron en respuesta al lanzamiento de mΟΓs de 400 cohetes desde Gaza hacia JerusalΟ©n, Tel Aviv, Ashkelon y Lod.
El preΟΓmbulo de esta escalada militar fueron los enfrentamientos entre fuerzas israelΟ≠es y palestinos en JerusalΟ©n, que dejaron centenares de heridos.
SegΟΚn el anΟΓlisis de Jeremy Bowen, editor de Medio Oriente de la BBC, "los factores desencadenantes de lo que ha sucedido esta vez incluyen el control policial israelΟ≠ de mano dura sobre los palestinos durante el RamadΟΓn y los controvertidos esfuerzos de los tribunales israelΟ≠es para desalojar a palestinos de sus hogares".
En este video explicamos 3 claves de esta nueva escalada del conflicto.

snippet.title: Dua Lipa - Future Nostalgia Medley (Live at the BRIT Awards 2021)
snippet.description:
#DuaLipa #FutureNostalgia #BRITAwards2021
Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-KZfRV8c13fOCkhXdLiQ?sub_confirmation=1

See more official videos from Dua Lipa here:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLNrotoZZ8BaoXT_LJuwEyESQlctWNDCwD

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgia

Listen to more from the album 'Future Nostalgia' :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLNrotoZZ8BaouNABcO_A9Xkn_Nkz0PT11

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagram
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebook
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficial
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitter
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtube

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

snippet.title: Olivia Rodrigo - deja vu (Live Performance) | Vevo LIFT
snippet.description:
Olivia Rodrigo - deja vu (Live Performance) | Vevo LIFT

She played Paige and Nini, and fans loved her in both roles. But acting isnβÄôt the only thing that Olivia Rodrigo is great at. When the βÄ‰High School Musical: The Musical: The SeriesβÄô  star dropped her βÄ€drivers licenseβÄù video back at the start of the year, the overwhelming response made it clear that she had a way of deeply communicating with listeners not only as an actor, but as an artist. Views-wise, it crossed the 200-million mark in just four months. Pretty impressive for someone who had never put out an album on her own. Rodrigo, who proved βÄ€drivers licenseβÄù was no fluke when βÄ€deja vuβÄù also hit a home run upon release last month, is fixing that. Her βÄ‰SourβÄô debut arrives on May 21, and by the time it gets here, she will have performed at both the BRIT Awards and Saturday Night Live. Billboard reports that the 18-year-old pop phenom is the βÄ€first artist to send her first two proper singles straight into the Hot 100βÄôs top 10.βÄù The SoCal native, who wrote βÄ€driverβÄôs licenseβÄù with her pal Dan Nigro, recently told the press that she was obsessed with emotions, and loved her jobs as both actor and musician because they allow her to be so expressive. WeβÄôre thrilled that we got to work with Olivia on designing our exclusive LIFT content. A few weeks ago we hit the L.A., connected with Team Rodrigo, and came home with the kind of pieces that will give fans a revealing look into the singerβÄôs personality, two unique performances and an exclusive interview portrait. First up is βÄ€deja vu,βÄù and the setting couldnβÄôt be any more fun.  βÄ€These pieces look amazing on film,βÄù says Rodrigo. βÄ€It captures the tone of my work in a really powerful way.βÄù  Hang tight, thereβÄôs more Olivia on the way.
 
Watch the official video of "deja vu": https://youtu.be/cii6ruuycQA
 
Watch Olivia Rodrigo videos: https://bit.ly/3eLiKRH

snippet.title: Olivia Rodrigo - drivers license (Live From The BRIT Awards 2021)
snippet.description:
Olivia Rodrigo Performs 'drivers license' Live at the BRIT Awards 2021

Shop SOUR: https://smarturl.it/oliviarodrigoshop

Lyrics:

I got my driver's license last week
Just like we always talked about
'Cause you were so excited for me
To finally drive up to your house
But today I drove through the suburbs
Crying 'cause you weren't around

And you're probably with that blonde girl
Who always made me doubt
She's so much older than me
She's everything I'm insecure about
Yeah, today I drove through the suburbs
'Cause how could I ever love someone else?

And I know we weren't perfect but I've never felt this way for no one
And I just can't imagine how you could be so okay now that I'm gone
Guess you didn't mean what you wrote in that song about me
'Cause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street

And all my friends are tired
Of hearing how much I miss you, but
I kinda feel sorry for them
'Cause they'll never know you the way that I do, yeah
Today I drove through the suburbs
And pictured I was driving home to you

And I know we weren't perfect
But I've never felt this way for no one, oh
And I just can't imagine how you could be so okay, now that I'm gone
I guess you didn't mean what you wrote in that song about me
'Cause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street

Red lights, stop signs
I still see your face in the white cars, front yards
Can't drive past the places we used to go to
'Cause I still fuckin' love you, babe (ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh)
Sidewalks we crossed
I still hear your voice in the traffic, we're laughing
Over all the noise
God, I'm so blue, know we're through
But I still fuckin' love you, babe (ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh)

I know we weren't perfect but I've never felt this way for no one
And I just can't imagine how you could be so okay, now that I'm gone
'Cause you didn't mean what you wrote in that song about me
'Cause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street
Yeah, you said forever, now I drive alone past your street

Red lights, stop signs
I still see your face in the white cars, front yards
Can't drive past the places we used to go to
'Cause I still fuckin' love you, babe (ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh)
Sidewalks we crossed
I still hear your voice in the traffic, we're laughing
Over all the noise
God, I'm so blue, know we're through
But I still fuckin' love you, babe (ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh)

I know we weren't perfect but I've never felt this way for no one
And I just can't imagine how you could be so okay, now that I'm gone
'Cause you didn't mean what you wrote in that song about me
'Cause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street
Yeah, you said forever, now I drive alone past your street

http://vevo.ly/jMrD19

snippet.title: The Weeknd - Save Your Tears (Live at The BRIT Awards 2021)
snippet.description:
βÄ€Save Your TearsβÄù (Live at The BRIT Awards 2021) 

'After Hours' available everywhere now: http://theweeknd.co/afterhoursYDβÄ΄ βÄ΄

β•ΚSubscribe to The Weeknd on YouTube: http://theweeknd.co/subscribeYDβÄ΄ βÄ΄

β•ΚGet exclusive merch: shop.theweeknd.comβÄ΄

β•ΚFollow The Weeknd:
https://twitter.com/theweekndβÄ΄βÄ΄
https://www.facebook.com/theweekndβÄ΄
https://www.instagram.com/theweekndβÄ΄βÄ΄
https://www.theweeknd.comβÄ΄βÄ΄

Lyrics:

Ooh
Na na, yeah
I saw you dancing in a crowded room
You look so happy when I'm not with you
But then you saw me, caught you by surprise
A single teardrop falling from your eye

I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away

You could've asked me why I broke your heart
You could've told me that you fell apart
But you walked past me like I wasn't there
And just pretended like you didn't care

I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Take me back 'cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day

So
I made you think that I would always stay
I said some things that I should never say
Yeah, I broke your heart like someone did to mine
And now you won't love me for a second time

I don't know why I run away, oh, girl
Said I make you cry when I run away
Girl, take me back 'cause I wanna stay

Save your tears for another
I realize that I'm much too late
And you deserve someone better

Save your tears for another day (Ooh, yeah)
Save your tears for another day (Yeah)

I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away

snippet.title: Caen en el OCΟâANO ΟçNDICO los restos del COHETE CHINO descontrolado I RTVE Noticias
snippet.description:
Los restos del cohete chino Larga Marcha 5B reentraron en la atmΟ≥sfera terrestre a las 10.24 (2.24 GMT) de la maΟ±ana de este domingo y han caΟ≠do a 72.47 grados de longitud este y 2.65 grados de latitud norte, ha anunciado la Oficina de IngenierΟ≠a Espacial Tripulada de China.

Las coordenadas quedarΟ≠an entorno a las islas Maldivas en el ocΟ©ano Οçndico, al sur de la India, apunta la prensa local, mientras que el organismo asegura que la mayor parte de los restos se desintegraron al colisionar con la atmΟ≥sfera terrestre.

El tamaΟ±o del objeto, con una masa estimada de entre 17 y 21 toneladas y un tamaΟ±o de aproximadamente 30 metros, y la velocidad a la que avanzaba -unos 28.000 kilΟ≥metros por hora- motivΟ≥ la activaciΟ≥n de varios de los servicios de vigilancia espacial mΟΓs importantes del mundo, entre ellos el PentΟΓgono o el Servicio de Vigilancia y Seguimiento Espacial de la UniΟ≥n Europea (EUSST).

snippet.title: Una ESPAΟëOLA en TEL AVIV y un doctor en GAZA describen el conflicto entre ISRAEL y HAMΟ¹S | RTVE
snippet.description:
El Canal 24 Horas entrevista a Usama Said Agloud, neurocirujano en Gaza, y a Patricia Alonso, espaΟ±ola residente en Tel Aviv.

La violencia entre judΟ≠os y ΟΓrabes se extiende en las ciudades mixtas de Israel (con importante presencia ΟΓrabe-israelΟ≠), lo que abre un frente interno al gobierno israelΟ≠ mientras continΟΚa la escalada bΟ©lica en Gaza iniciada el pasado lunes. 

Grupos de ciudadanos ΟΓrabes y judΟ≠os se han enfrentado y se han producido dos linchamientos: el de un ΟΓrabe en Bat Yam y el de un judΟ≠o en Acre. Ambos se encuentran en estado grave.

El ministro israelΟ≠, BenjamΟ≠n Netanyahu, ha advertido que "nada justifica el linchamiento de judΟ≠os por parte de ΟΓrabes y nada justifica el linchamiento de ΟΓrabes por parte de judΟ≠os". Por su parte, el presidente, RubΟ©n Rivlin, ha descrito los incidentes como "una guerra civil sin razΟ≥n", y ha pedido a las autoridades locales y religiosas que intervengan para detener la violencia.

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Man City 1-2 Chelsea, City miss chance to clinch Title.
snippet.description:
CityβÄôs hopes of being crowned Premier League champions were frustrated as Pep GuardiolaβÄôs side lost out 2-1 at home by Chelsea.
Knowing victory at the Etihad would see us regain the title, we gained a 44th minute lead thanks to Raheem SterlingβÄôs close-range strike.

Sergio Aguero then saw a 45th minute penalty saved βÄ™ and Chelsea hit back after the break as Hakim Ziyech levelled affairs on the hour.

However, though City strove to find a winner and saw a shout for a late penalty turned down, it was Cheslea who gained the winner, Marcos Alonso beating Ederson in injury time to seal the victory and ensure the race goes on βÄ™ at least for 24 hours.


SUBSCRIBE! http://www.youtube.com/subscription_c...βÄ΄

snippet.title: J. Balvin - 7 De Mayo
snippet.description:
J Balvin βÄ™ 7 de mayo (Official Video)

βÄ‰7 de mayoβÄô out now: https://JBalvin.lnk.to/7deMayo!YD 

Shop: https://jbalvinstore.universalmusica.com/

Subscribe to J Balvin's channel here: https://smarturl.it/JBalvinYT

Follow J Balvin: 
https://instagram.com/jbalvin  
https://twitter.com/jbalvin 
https://www.facebook.com/JBalvinOficial 
https://www.tiktok.com/@jbalvin 

LYRICS

[Audio Bit Alba Balvin] 

βÄ€Que tu nombre, Jose, ilumine siempre los rostros de las personas.
Que entre Jose y J Balvin no existan diferenciasβÄù.

1985, 7 de mayo,
Un barrio en medio de Medallo saliΟ≥ este gallo,
Con el sudor en la frente,
En las manos callos,
ComprendΟ≠ que sin raΟ≠ces no salen tallos,
Caminando por las calles de FΟΓtima,
Las cuchas de los parceros con lΟΓgrimas,
Hey! Aspiraciones de maleante,
Y por cosas de la vida terminΟ© siendo cantante.

Sin redes, sin prensa, la cosa tensa,
Pope con trenzas con Maxi bajo el brazo,
Mucha gente nos tildaba de payasos,
Pero yo era un rey desde que mami estaba en embarazo.

Al ΟΓrabe su hermano lo mataron a balazos,
Pero aprendiΟ≥ a cantazos,
Todo en la vida paso a paso,
En mi mente la palabra Ο©xito opacΟ≥ al fracaso.

AprendΟ≠ a navegar en la marea,
Desde El Poblado hasta el Francisco Antonio Zea,
Era muy Nea paβÄô los ricos y muy rico paβÄô las Neas,
Todo bello aunque la cosa estaba fea,
Nunca me enseΟ±aron la palabra envidia,
Y que primero la familia,
Sagrada como Biblia,
Nunca te pases de la lΟ≠nea,
Porque puedes terminar como Gaviria.

[Audio Bit Alba Balvin]
βÄ€Sigue siempre el consejo de tu padre, que contra todas las apariencias, lo que queda 
del hombre, es la palabraβÄù.

QuiΟ©n dirΟ≠a que el muchacho cantando en la barberΟ≠a,
El que la esquina mantenΟ≠a,
Como Los Cangris se vestΟ≠a,
Y yo supe soΟ±ar,
Yankee fue el que me entregΟ≥ el premio de Ο≠cono mundial,
Un colombiano haciendo Reggeaton,
QuΟ© estupidez,
Pero, yo vΟ≠ todo con lucidez,
AmΟ© las tarimas desde la primera vez,
Katherine se arrepiente de ser mi ex,
Pero cero rencor, 
Al contrario, agradecimiento,
Con los maestros, 
Que dieron conocimiento,
Pero estoy claro, no te miento,
Ser una leyenda,
Sin necesidad de monumento.
Y pasΟ© por ansiedad,
TambiΟ©n por depresiΟ≥n,
PasΟ© por falsedad,
Y mal de corazΟ≥n,
Gracias a mi mamΟΓ,
Me pongo en oraciΟ≥n,
Y hoy en dΟ≠a no me falta la motivaciΟ≥n,
En mi habitaciΟ≥n,
La meditaciΟ≥n,
Para que nunca me falte la conexiΟ≥n,
Si me muero no recuerden al pegado,
Si no al parcero que ha dejado su legado.

[Audio Bit Daddy Yankee]

βÄ€El propΟ≥sito de un lΟ≠der, siempre es crear a un nuevo lΟ≠der. Estoy bien orgulloso de ti, y contento de que, por lo que nosotros nos sacrificamos tanto, ustedes estΟ©n ahora 
 volando por todo lo alto, asΟ≠ que sigue rompiendo hermanito, estoy bien orgulloso de      
 ti y de Ο≠cono a Ο≠cono mundial, mucho respeto papito, te lo merecesβÄù.

Que soy perro, que hice trΟ≠os, porque hacΟ≠a frΟ≠o,
Con mil mujeres me he metido,
A la mΟΓs santa le he metido,
Que yo hice cosas sin sentido,
Lo sΟ©,
Pero eso no me hizo mΟΓs hombre,
Yo era un niΟ±o asustado en el desorden,
Y aunque nunca he sido de escΟΓndalos,
Par de gente ha querido manchar mi nombre,
Pero son mΟΓs los que me quieren,
MΟΓs los que me apoyan,
Nena tu sabes que salimos de la olla,
Dios te bendiga y te ponga como joya,
SΟ© que mi mΟΚsica te soya,
Yo crecΟ≠ escuchando a Jay Z y a Beyonce,
Nicky, Yankee, Οëejo de Ponce,
SoΟ±aba con grabar con ellos entonces,
Se me cumpliΟ≥ lo que soΟ±aba a los once.








ENGLISH

[Audio Bit Alba Balvin] 

βÄ€That your name, Jose, brings joy to other peopleβÄôs faces.
That between Jose and J Balvin we never see a differenceβÄù

1985, may 7th,
In a slum in the middle of Medallo, this one was born,
With sweat on my forehead,
Calluses in my hands,
I understood that without roots you canβÄôt have branches,
Walking on the streets of Fatima,
The face of my peers flooded with tears,
Hey! Criminal aspirations,
And I ended up being a singer.

No social media, no press, everything was tense,
Pope had braids and Maxi under his arm, 
A lot of people said that we were clowns,
But I was a king since mommy was pregnant.


The arab guyβÄôs brother was killed in a hall of bullets,
But he learned the hard way,
Step by step with everything in life,
In my mind, the word success overshadowed failure.

I learned to sail the tide,
From El Poblado to Francisco Antonio Zea,
Too ghetto for the rich and too rich for the ghetto,
Everything nice even though the situation was ugly,
Nobody taught me the word envy,
And family is always first,
Holy like the bible,
Never cross the line,
Because you could end up like Gaviria.


[Audio Bit Alba Balvin]

βÄ€Always follow you fatherβÄôs advise, because in spite of all appearances, what defines 
and makes a man itβÄôs his word.βÄù


Who wouldβÄôve thought that the boy singing on the barber shop,
The one that kept the corner,
Dressed up like the Cangris,
And I knew how to dream,
Yankee was the one that gave me the global icon prize.
A colombian singing Reggeaton,
How stupid,
But I saw everything lucidly,
I loved the stage since my first time...

snippet.title: Starship | SN15 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Wednesday, May 5, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 15 (SN15) βÄ™ our fifth high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype from Starbase in Texas. SN15 has vehicle improvements across structures, avionics and software, and the engines that will allow more speed and efficiency throughout production and flight: specifically, a new enhanced avionics suite, updated propellant architecture in the aft skirt, and a new Raptor engine design and configuration. 

Similar to previous high-altitude flight tests of Starship, SN15 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee βÄ™ approximately 10 km in altitude. SN15 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control StarshipβÄôs attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN15βÄôs Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceXβÄôs fifth high-altitude flight test of Starship!

snippet.title: Isla de Man, ¬Ωdentro y fuera del Reino Unido?
snippet.description:
Entre Inglaterra e Irlanda nos encontramos con la Isla de Man, un lugar con un estatus jurΟ≠dico muy particular: depende de la corona britΟΓnica, pero no es parte del Reino Unido. 

AllΟ≠ viven 80.000 personas que cada aΟ±o son testigos de la prueba con motor mΟΓs peligrosa y arriesgada: motos que van a 300 km/h en una prueba contrarreloj ΟΚnica.

en.title: Isle of Man, inside and outside the UK?
en.description:
Between England and Ireland we find the Isle of Man, a place with a very particular legal status: it depends on the British crown, but it is not part of the United Kingdom.

In there 80,000 people live, who every year witness the most dangerous and risky motor event: motorcycles that go 300 km / h in a unique time trial.

Knowing the political reality of the Isle of Man will allow us to differentiate concepts that are sometimes confused: what is the difference between England, Great Britain and the United Kingdom? The classification can hide stories that are confusing even for the inhabitants of the area.

πü¨é Un Mundo Inmenso
Singularities of our planet

snippet.title: Historias Innecesarias: Ley de Etiquetado - ¬ΩQue comemos?
snippet.description:
Hoy vamos a hablar de los ULTRAPROCESADOS, productos empaquetados repletos de calorΟ≠as, azΟΚcar, grasas de mala calidad y sal. Cosas que nos encantan y a las que somos adictos, cosas que comemos en excesoβÄΠpero quΟ© pasa si te digo que ese exceso no es del todo nuestra culpa? Cuantas cosas tienen azΟΚcar sin que lo sepamos?  Sabemos quΟ© estamos comiendo? La respuesta a Ο©sta ΟΚltima pregunta: NO.
Necesitamos una ley de etiquetados de manera urgente, sencillamente porque tenemos derecho a saber quΟ© estamos comiendoβÄΠsi nos vamos a llenar de azΟΚcar, hagΟΓmoslo conscientemente.
La ley de etiquetado frontal con octΟ≥gonos negros FUNCIONA y hay que aplicarla.
